ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Non-banks, Real economy, Banks) */,
  "sector_type" TEXT /* Type of sector (e.g., financial, non-financial) */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sector */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating whether the sector is active or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sector was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sector was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data entry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the data belongs to */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period the data corresponds to (e.g., 2016-Q4) */,
  "assets" REAL /* Total assets of the sector during the time period */,
  "liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the sector during the time period */,
  "total_equity" REAL /* Total equity of the sector during the time period */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit of the sector during the time period */,
  "debt_ratio" REAL /* Debt-to-equity ratio of the sector during the time period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node (e.g., iv, nfc, mfi, ofi, icpf) */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the node belongs to */,
  "node_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of node (e.g., commercial, investment) */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating whether the node is active or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_data" (
  "node_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node data entry */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the node the data belongs to */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period the data corresponds to (e.g., 2016-Q4) */,
  "assets" REAL /* Total assets of the node during the time period */,
  "liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the node during the time period */,
  "total_equity" REAL /* Total equity of the node during the time period */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit of the node during the time period */,
  "debt_ratio" REAL /* Debt-to-equity ratio of the node during the time period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_data_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
